arts.ttl: Brentford vs Man City: Prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Bees out to sting Premier League champions once again

arts.ttl: Walker has asked to leave Man City - Guardiola
arts.sum: Watch as Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says England defender Kyle Walker will be potentially "exploring" a move abroad and leaving the club in January.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says Man City far from best in cup rout but welcomes morale boost
arts.sum: City ran out 8-0 winners over Salford to book their place in the FA Cup fourth round.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola shows true Man City colours with classy Salford gesture after FA Cup rout
arts.sum: Latest Manchester City news after the 8-0 FA Cup victory over Salford City with Pep Guardiola showing his class in the aftermath

arts.ttl: Man City 8-0 Salford City: James McAtee shows his star quality with hat-trick in FA Cup thrashing of Class of 92' rivals as several Etihad youngsters impress in dominant win
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT AT THE ETIHAD: Perhaps Gary Neville intuited what was coming when the biggest day in his decade as a co-owner of Salford City finally dawned in this FA Cup contest.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer latest as striker progress made and £33.5million deal agreed
arts.sum: Abdukodir Khusanov will join Manchester City after a deal was agreed with Lens and Omar Marmoush could follow with talks progressing

arts.ttl: Man City put eight past Salford to progress to fourth round
arts.sum: Watch highlights as Jack Grealish scores his first goal in over a year and James McAtee scores a second-half hat-trick as Manchester City surge to their biggest win since January 2019 to knock League Two Salford out of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains strange Man City team decision with fresh transfer update
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola named just one senior centre-back in his Manchester City side to face Salford in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Man City: Pep Guardiola hails 'special' James McAtee with Cole Palmer reminder
arts.sum: McAtee came through the City academy with the likes of Palmer and Jadon Sancho

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola confirms Kyle Walker wants to LEAVE Man City this month
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has confirmed Kyle Walker was left out of the squad to face Salford City in order to push for a transfer exit during the January window
